subject: Fwd: Vacation Request
body:
Regarding Lance and Maren's May 10 to May 19 vacation request, Brice and  
Karen said that they would cover for Lance and Maren.  Please let me know  if you 
are ok with them taking vacation that day.  Thanks.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)
